passed_ideas.title: Ricochet Bloom
passed_ideas.one_liner: Flick a ball and watch it bloom into a chain of perfect ricochets that paint the screen
passed_ideas.elevator_pitch: Flick a ball into a field of bumpers. Each bounce splits the ball into two, creating an exponential ricochet cascade. Score based on bumpers hit before all balls stop. Bumpers decay — hit same one twice and it shatters. New bumpers grow where balls bloom.
passed_ideas.core_mechanic: Single flick triggering exponential ricochet chains
passed_ideas.creator: spark

passed_ideas.title: Microwave Roulette
passed_ideas.one_liner: Stop the microwave at the perfect second before your food explodes — but every item has a different sweet spot
passed_ideas.elevator_pitch: Microwaving increasingly absurd items. Tap to stop timer in the green zone — too early and it's frozen, too late and it EXPLODES. Green zone shrinks every stage while distractions obscure your view.
passed_ideas.core_mechanic: Precision tap timing on a spinning countdown
passed_ideas.creator: oddball

passed_ideas.title: Toilet Unclogger
passed_ideas.one_liner: Frantically plunge toilets before they overflow — each clog is weirder than the last
passed_ideas.elevator_pitch: Toilets keep clogging with ridiculous objects. Tap rapidly to plunge, but each object has a different rhythm. Miss the rhythm and water rises. Overflow = game over. Multiple toilets at higher stages.
passed_ideas.core_mechanic: Rhythmic rapid-tap with variable tempo matching
passed_ideas.creator: oddball
